prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Structural framing, part of the Carpentry & Finishes scope. The observed field condition is: undersized header (span vs. table - ME+DOC). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IRC R502, R602.
title: Compliance check: Structural framing (service call)
